summary: Add custom resize-edge hit areas that keep native resize behavior and recover the frameless desktop window when its edge is stranded off-screen.

review_items.summary: The React WebView shell exposes invisible resize-edge zones that start Tauri resize dragging for each window edge and corner.
Double-clicking a resize edge or corner repositions the window so its outer bounds are clamped inside the current monitor work area.
The desktop capability adds only the Tauri window permissions needed to read outer bounds, read monitor work areas, set window position, and start resize dragging.
Desktop auth, billing, backend API, workspace, terminal, and database contracts are unchanged.

rules: Resize-edge recovery must not alter auth, billing, workspace, terminal, or database behavior.
Single-click dragging a resize edge must continue to invoke Tauri native resize dragging.
Double-clicking a resize edge must keep the window within the current monitor work area when Tauri monitor APIs are available.
Window API permissions must remain scoped to window positioning and resize behavior only.

tests.summary: Validate the desktop React WebView bundle.
